title: KSLU Admission 2026

detail.title: KSLU Admission 2026
detail.short_info: KSLU Admission 2026 is open at Karnataka State Law University’s Law School, Hubballi. Apply for 5 Year B.A. LL.B (Hons), B.B.A. LL.B (Hons) & B.Com LL.B (Hons). Check eligibility, application fee, important dates, and admission test on 07 June 2026. Last date to apply is 04-06-2026.

content.text: Karnataka State Law University’s Law School, Navanagar, Hubballi has officially released the admission notification for 5 Year B.A. LL.B. (Hons.), B.B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) and B.Com. LL.B. (Hons.) programmes for the academic year 2026-27. Applications are invited from eligible candidates who have completed 2-year PUC or equivalent examination.

Interested students can apply through offline or download mode. This is a golden opportunity for law aspirants seeking quality legal education with excellent facilities and experienced faculty at one of Karnataka’s reputed law schools.
Direct Notification PDF link: Click Here

rows: Karnataka State Law University’s Law School
5 Year B.A. LL.B. (Hons.), B.B.A. LL.B. (Hons.), B.Com. LL.B. (Hons.)
2 year PUC or equivalent with 45% marks (OBC 42%, SC/ST 40%)

items: Educational Qualification: 2 year PUC or equivalent course with 45% Aggregate Marks (OBC 42%, SC/ST 40%).
Age Limit: Maximum age is 20 years (born on or after 04-05-2006) for General category and 22 years (born on or after 04-05-2004) for SC, ST and Other Backward Class applicants.
Government rules relating to reservations apply.

content.text: Mode of Payment: Bank Challan or SBI Online Challan.

sections.heading: How to Apply for KSLU Admission 2026

items: Obtain the application form from the Office of the Karnataka State Law University’s Law School, Navanagar, Hubballi-580025 by paying the prescribed fee through Bank Challan / SBI Online Challan.
OR download the application form from the official website www.kslu.karnataka.gov.in.
Submit the filled application along with the Bank Challan / SBI Online Challan to: The Director, KSLU’s Law School, Navanagar, Hubballi-580025.

content.text: Admissions are based on an admission test designed to assess the candidate’s skill in:

items: Free access to Manupatra, Westlaw and Hein online databases
Opportunities to participate in National Moot Court Competitions, Conferences, Workshops
Ample scope for developing mooting & advocacy skills
